description: Use this API to purge specified harmonics Two Terminal DC data from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = har_2tdc_purg(name, ibus)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Two term dc line name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Rectifier or inverter bus number. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
